CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows Net Cash to Seller at Closing minus Total Purchase Loan Principal Retired minus Sum of Improvements/Adjustments plus Sum of Cash Out Before Resale.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows Net Cash to Seller at Closing minus Total Purchase Loan Principal Retired minus Sum of Improvements/Adjustments plus Sum of Cash Out Before Resale.
CustomField.label: Seller's Proceeds
